summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a great show with strong soundboard and audience blend
review: The reviewer rates this performance highly, noting the very good soundboard/audience matrix that delivers clear, balanced audio. The concert itself is described as a "great" show, though no specific songs or moments are singled out.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review praises both the matrix recording quality and overall performance, indicating a high‑quality show and listenable source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a very good SBD/AUD matrix, suggesting clear mix with both soundboard clarity and audience ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply notes the show was great.
